'''Kaerobani's holocron''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] stolen by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Kaerobani]]. He stole it from a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] using a captured [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]]. He then took it to [[Kaerobani's base|his base]] on [[Rathalay]] to add it to his collection of rare artifacts.

The holocron was recovered by [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] who infiltrated his base.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' {{1st}}
